rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning variable declarations with expression types: bool for comparisons, int for integers, real for floating-point values.
Resolve unresolved references by using only visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not introduce new package or data type declarations.
Ensure AGREE clauses referencing component ports are placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
Delete invalid AGREE guarantees or equations that reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must maintain type consistency: variables must be declared with types matching their assigned expressions.
Generated AGREE code should only reference identifiers visible in the current scope and declared in the same annex.
Component type contracts should only reference visible ports and type-level helpers, not implementation-specific subcomponents.
When AGREE diagnostics report unresolved references, prioritize fixing root causes rather than adding new architecture.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and should be placed in component type or implementation scopes as appropriate.
Helper declarations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool; avoid package-qualified names unless imported.
Guarantees and assumptions should reference only visible features or previously declared helpers in the same annex.
Assignments in AGREE must reference valid output features or variables defined in the same scope.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package or data type declarations in AGREE to resolve type errors; instead, use existing visible identifiers.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes; move them to implementation scopes if needed.
Do not attempt to repair AGREE clauses by adding new architecture; instead, delete or rewrite invalid clauses to use existing identifiers.
Do not assume that unresolved references can be fixed by inventing new helper declarations; always verify visibility in the current scope.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
